info.address2: Yard 6 North Ring Road Tangjialing Haidian District
info.longBusinessSummary: DiDi Global Inc. operates a mobility technology platform that provides various mobility and other services in the People's Republic of China, Brazil, Mexico, and internationally. It operates through three segments: China Mobility, International, and Other Initiatives. The company offers ride hailing, online taxi, chauffeur, hitch, and other forms of shared mobility services; leasing and refueling solutions; electric vehicle charging services; and bike and e-bike sharing, intra-city freight, food delivery, and financial services. It also developing an autonomous driving solution. The company was formerly known as Xiaoju Kuaizhi Inc. and changed its name to DiDi Global Inc. in June 2021. DiDi Global Inc. was founded in 2012 and is headquartered in Beijing, China.

companyOfficers.title: Founder, Executive Chairman of the Board & CEO
